# Shaping Frame

Canonical page: https://xxyoudeadpunkxx.github.io/shaping-frame-for-claude/
Repository: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude
Source branch: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/tree/main
License: CC BY-SA 4.0
License file: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/blob/main/LICENSE

Shaping Frame is a Claude Desktop skill for tracking epistemic weight during
complex working sessions. It separates operator decisions, imported material,
Claude-generated proposals, model priors, and documentary state.

The public page is a GitHub Pages project site for orientation. Source and
distribution files live on the repository main branch.

Primary source files:

- Skill package: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/main/shaping-frame.skill
- Custom instruction: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/blob/main/CUSTOM_INSTRUCTION.txt
- README: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/blob/main/README.md
- License: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/blob/main/LICENSE

The skill package contains:

- shaping-frame/SKILL.md
- shaping-frame/references/frame.md
- shaping-frame/references/dogana.md
- shaping-frame/references/snapshot.md

Discovery companion:

- Manifest: https://xxyoudeadpunkxx.github.io/shaping-frame-for-claude/raw-manifest.json
- Sitemap: https://xxyoudeadpunkxx.github.io/shaping-frame-for-claude/sitemap.xml
